_comment: Project-level Claude Code settings for the mmf-claude-code repo. Loaded automatically when Claude Code is run from any directory inside the repo.

hooks.command: if [[ "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}" == */sync/*.sh ]]; then if ! bash -n "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH}" 2>&1; then echo "SYNTAX ERROR in ${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH} — fix before committing." >&2; exit 2; fi; fi
